title: landolphia scandens
intro: Landolphia scandens is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stem, which are used to treat various health issues. The leaves and stem of Landolphia scandens have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
